steps.title: Translate the saving relationship
steps.content:
Hannah saves $\frac{1}{5}h$ and Wyatt saves $\frac{2}{7}w$. Together they save \$3,270 each month:

$$\frac{h}{5}+\frac{2w}{7}=3{,}270$$

steps.title: Clear the fractions
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by the common denominator $35$:

$$7h+10w=35\cdot 3{,}270=114{,}450$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
